title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Smartworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
